recentHighlights: The Darkness and the Light (S5E11) — Kira's Shakaar resistance cell is murdered one by one. A disfigured Cardassian (Silaran Prin) has spent a decade planning revenge. The darkness/light metaphor: Kira confronted with the mirror of her own violence. "Let's go home." Story by Bryan Fuller, teleplay by Ronald D. Moore.

Rapture (S5E10) — Sisko discovers B'hala through prophetic visions caused by a temporal lobe tumor. The prophecy-vs-pathology question left unresolved. Jake gives consent for the surgery that ends the visions. Winn wins the Federation vote. Written by L.J. Friedman, directed by Jonathan West.

The Ascent (S5E09) — Odo/Quark survival on a frozen planet. Forced proximity strips ten years of artifice. Quark carries the transmitter AND Odo up the mountain on a broken leg. "I just wanted you to know... I meant every word of it." "So did I." Written by Behr & Wolfe, directed by Kroeker.

Things Past (S5E08) — Odo relives his greatest sin: three innocent Bajorans executed on his watch. The Great Link forces him to confess. "Now I'm just another imperfect solid." Written by Michael Taylor, directed by LeVar Burton.

Let He Who Is Without Sin... (S5E07) — Worf's backstory revealed: at 13, he broke another boy's neck in a soccer accident. Worf's rigidity is trauma response, not cultural Klingon-ness. Directed by Rene Auberjonois.
